title: Debug a Flask app with a syntax error

content.problemStatement:
In this worked out example, we'll debug a Flask application that has a syntax error.

### Task
1. Run the Flask application.
2. Observe the error message in the console.
3. Identify the type of error and the line where it occurs.
4. Fix the error in the code.
5. Run the application again to verify the fix.

This example demonstrates how to interpret a common syntax error in Flask applications and how to resolve it. \
Remember, always read the error message carefully, identify the line number, and examine the code around that line to spot and fix the issue.

Click on 'Run' to view the webpage. \
Click on 'Submit' to check if your code is correct.
